message:
The last storm that rolled through our area had us hunkering down, and honestly, it turned out to be a bit of a blessing in disguise. With the power out and the winds howling outside, our family found ourselves rediscovering the joys of low-tech fun. We dug out the board games, lit some candles, and shared stories that hadn’t been told in ages. It was a beautiful reminder that sometimes, the best moments come when we unplug and reconnect with each other. 

As we prepared for the storm, we also pulled together a little emergency kit to keep us ready for whatever might come our way. This little refresher helped to make the experience feel less daunting. Have you ever found joy in a stormy day? What’s your favorite way to pass the time when the weather keeps you indoors?
